allow: Bash(iverilog -t null -I rtl/core tb/tb_arcriscv.v rtl/core/arcriscv.v rtl/core/pc_cnt.v rtl/core/if_id.v rtl/core/regs.v rtl/core/id_ex.v rtl/core/ram.v rtl/core/decode.v rtl/core/ex.v rtl/core/rom.v)
Bash(awk -F '\\t' 'NF != 2 {print "Line " NR " has " NF " fields"} !/^[0-9]+\\t[0-9a-f]{8}$/ {print "Line " NR " format mismatch"}' dram.txt)
Bash(awk -F '\\t' 'NF != 2 {print "Line " NR " has " NF " fields"; exit 1} !/^[0-9]+\\t[0-9a-f]{8}$/ {print "Line " NR " format mismatch"; exit 1}' irom.txt)
